view.params:
SELECT cght.hthm,cght.SID
FROM cght
WHERE (cght.cgsh<>"123") and (cght.rkwc="否") and  ((:qxjb1=2) OR ((:qxjb1 =0) AND (cght.sys_owner=:c_user)) OR ((:qxjb1 =1) AND (cght.sys_path like :c_depart)))
ORDER BY cght.SID ASC

SELECT wfgs.wfgs,wfgs.SID
FROM wfgs
ORDER BY wfgs.SID ASC

SELECT cangkuzl.ckmc,cangkuzl.SID
FROM cangkuzl
ORDER BY cangkuzl.SID ASC

SELECT ywrybiao.ryxm,ywrybiao.SID
FROM ywrybiao
ORDER BY ywrybiao.SID ASC

SELECT bzdw.dwdm,bzdw.SID
FROM bzdw
ORDER BY bzdw.SID ASC

SELECT jldw.dwdm,jldw.SID
FROM jldw
ORDER BY jldw.SID ASC
